'''Gna She'starn''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. 

It was located to the southeast of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] western continent. The city [[Navshe'starn]] was found to the northwest.

{{City-stub}}
